raw.message:
Warning: You're missing out on completing your Monopoly album!
Download our app now and start filling those gaps!
Will you be the first to finish?

hook.summary: Monopoly Go characters watch a shower of sticker packs fall from a portal.
hook.visual_action: Mr. Monopoly and a scientist look up in awe as sticker packs emerge from a swirling portal.

scene_flow: Monopoly Go characters witness a portal raining sticker packs.
Transition through a glass-shattering effect to the StickerHub app interface.
Step-by-step tutorial showing how to select duplicate cards and match with other players.
Demonstration of a successful instant trade and set completion.
Final branding scene with Mr. Monopoly facilitating a 'Quick Match' between real people.
on_screen_text: Match with the right people instantly
audience_proxy: Monopoly Go players who are frustrated with incomplete sticker sets and want a trading tool.
